overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a neon-lit night market with Japanese-inspired architecture, entering a ramen shop, exploring the interior, and exiting back to the market. The scene features vibrant cyan and magenta neon lights, red paper lanterns, wet reflective pavement, and detailed cyberpunk environmental storytelling.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered cyberpunk night market with food stalls

events.description: turning left to continue down the main market thoroughfare past food stalls

agents.ego_description: walking through the neon-lit market street, passing food stalls and observing the cyberpunk surroundings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright pink jacket walking ahead through the market
customer sitting at outdoor food stall near metal mesh wall

entered.detail: metal counter with food items and condiments under bright lighting
industrial metal fencing with blue-green neon lighting
string of traditional red Japanese lanterns hanging overhead
illuminated vending machine with cyberpunk advertisements

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered cyberpunk night market with wet reflective pavement and vibrant neon lighting. The player walks past a food stall where a customer sits near a metal mesh wall, while red paper lanterns hang overhead. The camera turns to follow the main thoroughfare where a pedestrian in a pink jacket walks ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: entrance to 24-hour ramen shop with neon signage

events.description: approaching the ramen shop entrance with prominent neon signage and red lanterns
entering the shop interior transitioning from cool neon to warm artificial lighting

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the ramen shop through the traditional Japanese-style doorway

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt walking away from camera toward the shop entrance

entered.detail: traditional Japanese style entrance with wooden beams and hanging red lanterns
large pink neon sign with Japanese characters indicating 24-hour service
transparent doors revealing the warm interior lighting

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a ramen shop entrance marked by a bright pink neon 24-hour sign and traditional red lanterns. A pedestrian in white walks ahead toward the entrance. The camera moves through the doorway, transitioning from the cool blue-green neon of the market to the warm yellow-orange interior lighting of the restaurant.

scene_state.functional_zone: cozy ramen restaurant interior with counter and table seating

events.description: turning right to walk past the counter area with seated customers

agents.ego_description: walking through the restaurant interior, observing the dining area, counter seating, and kitchen area

notable_agents.action: customer in red top sitting at the counter eating ramen
customer with white hair sitting at counter using a device

entered.detail: wooden tables with red chairs, condiments, and chopstick holders
white stools lined along the kitchen counter where customers sit
large decorative wall with underwater scene and fish visible behind seating
large black industrial pendant lights illuminating the dining area

segments.scene_description: Inside the warmly lit ramen shop, the player walks past dining tables with red chairs and industrial pendant lights. The camera moves toward the counter where customers sit on stools eating, including a person in a red top and another with white hair. A distinctive aquarium wall is visible in the back corner as the player turns toward the exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: open-air cyberpunk market with overhead canopy and city views

events.description: exiting the ramen shop through the back door to the outdoor market area
transitioning from warm interior lighting back to cool cyan and magenta neon exterior

agents.ego_description: exiting the restaurant, ascending concrete stairs, and returning to the main market level

entered.detail: stairs leading up from the shop exit to the main market street level
metal structural canopy with hanging red lanterns and visible city lights above
tall buildings with bright purple and blue neon signage visible in the night sky

segments.scene_description: The player exits the ramen shop through a back door, ascending concrete stairs back to the main market level. The scene transitions from the warm interior back to the cool neon-lit exterior, revealing the market's overhead canopy structure and distant neon-lit skyscrapers against the night sky. The camera continues walking through the open market area with various stalls and pedestrians.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a cool, neon-lit night market into the warm interior of a ramen shop before returning to the vibrant city streets. It begins by moving through a covered market with wet reflective pavement and red paper lanterns, following a pedestrian in a pink jacket along the main thoroughfare. As the camera approaches a bright pink 24-hour sign, it passes through a doorway, transitioning from the blue-green exterior glow to the warm yellow-orange lighting of a restaurant filled with red chairs and industrial pendant lights. The movement continues past dining customers and a corner aquarium before turning toward a back exit. Finally, the camera ascends concrete stairs to emerge from the warmth back into the cool night air, revealing the market's overhead canopy and distant neon skyscrapers against the dark sky.
